verified.name: Danish data service Energi
verified.tagline: Live Danish grid prices and emissions, straight from Energinet
verified.description: Energinet publishes Denmark's electricity market and grid data as named open datasets you can query directly. Pull day-ahead spot prices, CO2 emissions, consumption and more by dataset name with a simple row limit. No key required, JSON out, CORS enabled.
verified.notes: The CO2Emis dataset returned an empty body for a default query; Elspotprices reliably returns rows.

verified.name: Luchtmeetnet
verified.tagline: Dutch air-quality readings and forecasts from RIVM stations
verified.description: The Netherlands' national air-quality network exposes its measuring stations and pollutant readings over an open API. Page through stations, then fetch measured and forecast values for components like NO2, PM10 and ozone. Keyless JSON with wide-open CORS.

verified.name: PM2.5 Open Data Portal
verified.tagline: Crowd-sourced low-cost PM2.5 sensor readings, refreshed live
verified.description: LASS aggregates thousands of community AirBox sensors (heavily in Taiwan) into one open feed. A single GET returns the latest snapshot from every device with timestamps, coordinates and particulate readings. No key needed—use the plain .json feed, since the default download is gzipped.
verified.notes: The advertised .json.gz endpoint serves gzipped octet-stream; the .json variant returns plain JSON. s_d0 is PM2.5, s_h0 humidity, s_t0 temperature.

verified.name: Solematica
verified.tagline: Compare Italian rooftop-solar installer offers in one call
verified.description: Solematica benchmarks photovoltaic packages from major Italian energy operators—price per kW, panels, inverters, batteries and warranties. The public /providers endpoint returns the full comparison as JSON with no key, provided you credit Solematica. Deeper data like energy prices and satellite roof analysis needs paid credits.
verified.freeTier: Free public /providers endpoint; other endpoints need paid credits
verified.notes: Docs require visible attribution to Solematica when displaying the data.

verified.name: UK Carbon Intensity
verified.tagline: How clean is Britain's grid right now? Ask National Grid
verified.description: The official Carbon Intensity API for Great Britain reports current and forecast grams of CO2 per kWh, plus a low/moderate/high index. National Grid ESO runs it, it needs no key, and it returns clean JSON with CORS enabled. Documented under a CC BY 4.0 licence.

verified.name: Website Carbon
verified.tagline: Estimate a web page's CO2 footprint from its byte weight
verified.description: Website Carbon models the greenhouse-gas emissions of loading a web page. The keyless /data endpoint takes a transfer size and a green-hosting flag and returns grams of CO2, an A–F rating and a 'cleaner than' percentile. The URL-scanning /site endpoint now requires an API token.
verified.notes: The /site?url= endpoint returns 401 Unauthorised without a token; only the byte-based /data endpoint is keyless.

verified.name: Binlist
verified.tagline: Look up card scheme, type and issuer from a BIN/IIN
verified.description: Binlist maps the leading digits of a payment card to its network, type, issuing bank and country. Append the BIN as a path segment with an 'Accept-Version: 3' header and you get tidy JSON back. Free and unauthenticated, though it's rate-limited and fronted by a firewall that rejects requests carrying a browser Origin header.
verified.rateLimit: Rate limited for unauthenticated use; exact limit unpublished
verified.notes: Cloudflare WAF returns 403 when an Origin header is sent, so CORS could not be cleanly observed; the 200 JSON was obtained without an Origin header.

verified.name: Fed Treasury
verified.tagline: Official U.S. Treasury fiscal data, from debt to FX rates
verified.description: The Treasury's Fiscal Data service publishes federal finances—exchange rates, the national debt, interest rates and more—as a filterable JSON API. Select fields, page and sort with query parameters; no key required. It's open U.S. Government data.

verified.name: Goldprice.dev
verified.tagline: Cross-validated gold, silver & copper spot prices in 13 currencies
verified.description: Goldprice.dev serves precious-metal spot and futures quotes reconciled across sources, in more than a dozen currencies. The keyless /v1/prices endpoint returns core spot rows; a free account unlocks history, statistics and higher limits. Anonymous calls carry a usage-notice header.
verified.freeTier: Free keyless tier (limited fields); free account lifts caps
verified.rateLimit: Anonymous usage caps apply; exact limit unpublished

verified.name: Razorpay IFSC
verified.tagline: Resolve any Indian bank IFSC code to branch details
verified.description: Razorpay's open IFSC service turns an Indian bank branch code into its bank, branch, address, city and supported rails like NEFT, RTGS, IMPS and UPI. Just append the code to the base URL for keyless JSON. CORS is wide open.

verified.name: Coffee
verified.tagline: A random photo of coffee, every single request
verified.description: Part of alexflipnote's playful image APIs, this one does exactly one thing: hand you a random coffee picture. A GET to /random.json returns a JSON object with the image URL. No key, no fuss.

verified.name: Fruityvice
verified.tagline: Nutrition and taxonomy facts for common fruits
verified.description: Fruityvice answers questions about fruit—family, genus, order and per-serving nutrition like calories, sugar and protein. Query a single fruit by name or pull the whole list. Keyless JSON, no signup.

verified.name: Open Food Facts
verified.tagline: Open barcode database of the world's packaged foods
verified.description: Open Food Facts is a crowd-sourced, ODbL-licensed database of packaged food products from around the globe. Look up any barcode to get product name, brands, Nutri-Score and more as JSON, optionally trimmed to just the fields you request. Free, keyless and commercially usable with attribution.
verified.dataLicense: Open Database License (ODbL); images CC BY-SA

verified.name: The Report of the Week
verified.tagline: Every food & drink review from TheReportOfTheWeek, as JSON
verified.description: A community-built API cataloguing YouTuber TheReportOfTheWeek's food, drink and 'Running On Empty' reviews. Filter /api/v1/reports by category, rating or date to get products, manufacturers, video codes and scores. Keyless JSON.
verified.notes: Live routes live under /api/v1/reports/ (OpenAPI at /docs/json); the bare /reviews path 404s.

verified.name: WhiskyHunter
verified.tagline: Historical stats from online whisky auctions
verified.description: WhiskyHunter aggregates results from the world's online whisky auction houses. The auctions_data feed returns daily per-house statistics—mean winning bid, trading volume and lot counts—as a JSON array. No key required.

verified.name: Call of Duty Mobile
verified.tagline: Unofficial CODM player profile lookups by name or UID
verified.description: A reverse-engineered API for Call of Duty: Mobile that fetches public player profiles—level, rank, rating and country—by nickname or UID. A GET to /user/{name} returns JSON with no key. Unofficial and community-maintained, so expect occasional gaps.
verified.notes: Unofficial, reverse-engineered. Root URL 302-redirects to the GitHub repo (Harry260/codm-api); the /user read endpoint is keyless. A separate /claim endpoint performs account actions and was not probed.

verified.name: Chess.com
verified.tagline: Read-only access to Chess.com players, games and clubs
verified.description: Chess.com's Published-Data API exposes public profiles, game archives, clubs, tournaments and leaderboards. Fetch a player by username to get their profile as JSON—no key, CORS enabled. The API prefers serial rather than parallel requests.
verified.rateLimit: Serial requests expected; no fixed cap published

verified.name: Digimon Information
verified.tagline: Look up Digimon creatures by name or level
verified.description: A tiny fan API listing Digimon with their name, evolution level and artwork. Query by name for a single creature or browse the full roster. Keyless JSON with CORS on.

verified.name: Digimon TCG
verified.tagline: Search Digimon Card Game cards from digimoncard.io
verified.description: A public search API for the Digimon trading card game. Query by card name to get types, colours, DP, effects, rarity and the sets a card appears in, all as JSON. No key required.

verified.name: GDBrowser
verified.tagline: Query Geometry Dash levels and players without the game
verified.description: GDBrowser wraps the Geometry Dash servers in a friendly REST API. Ask for a level by ID to get its name, author, difficulty, downloads, song and more as clean JSON—no key, CORS enabled. It's a community proxy, so it depends on the game's servers staying up.

verified.name: Hyrule Compendium
verified.tagline: Data on every item, monster and creature in Zelda: BOTW
verified.description: The Hyrule Compendium API serves entries from The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild—monsters, materials, equipment and more—with descriptions, locations, drops and images. Fetch an entry by name for JSON. Fan-made and keyless; it has moved off Heroku to api.hyrule-compendium.com.
verified.notes: The listed botw-compendium.herokuapp.com host is dead (Heroku 'No such app'); the API now lives at api.hyrule-compendium.com.

skipped.name: WallstreetBets
skipped.reason: Endpoint gone — dashboard.nbshare.io now redirects to Tradestie and all reddit/wallstreetbets routes (with or without a date param) return 404.

skipped.name: Comic Vine
skipped.reason: Requires an API key despite the 'auth: none' listing — keyless calls return 401 'Invalid API Key'.

skipped.name: GW2Spidy
skipped.reason: Endpoint dead — www.gw2spidy.com connection times out (8s, tried twice on two endpoints).
